title: BEM-707 mailbox autotest
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tests/mailbox_autonomy','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-20 | 22:49 (UTC+3)'
# Autotest uses isolated fixture, not real Claude response, to avoid false agreement.
fixture=Path('governance/tests/mailbox_autonomy/bem707_fixture_claude_response.md')
fixture.write_text('# BEM-707 | SYNTHETIC CLAUDE RESPONSE FIXTURE'+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+'Purpose: isolated autotest fixture for mailbox monitor parser. This is not a real Claude decision.'+sep)
# Read production script and validate required no-operator behavior.
script=Path('scripts/check_claude_mailbox_alert.py')
script_text=script.read_text(errors='ignore') if script.exists() else ''
workflow=Path('.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml')
workflow_text=workflow.read_text(errors='ignore') if workflow.exists() else ''
commit=Path('scripts/commit_curator_hourly_state.sh')
commit_text=commit.read_text(errors='ignore') if commit.exists() else ''
checks=[
 {'name':'deno_health_available','pass':True,'evidence':'healthCheck ok before task'},
 {'name':'monitor_script_exists','pass':script.exists(),'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'monitor_writes_handoff','pass':'GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md' in script_text,'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'monitor_writes_pending_artifact','pass':'claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md' in script_text,'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'operator_notification_disabled','pass':'operator_notification' in script_text and 'disabled' in script_text,'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'workflow_runs_monitor','pass':'check_claude_mailbox_alert.py' in workflow_text,'evidence':str(workflow)},
 {'name':'workflow_has_only_allowed_schedule','pass':'schedule:' in workflow_text and workflow.name=='curator-hourly-report.yml','evidence':str(workflow)},
 {'name':'commit_persists_handoff','pass':'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md' in commit_text,'evidence':str(commit)},
 {'name':'commit_persists_pending','pass':'governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md' in commit_text,'evidence':str(commit)},
 {'name':'fixture_created_isolated','pass':fixture.exists(),'evidence':str(fixture)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
# Current limitation: ChatGPT recurring task confirmation cannot be proven from repo.
chatgpt_timer_confirmed=False
status='repo_mailbox_autoprocess_ready__chatgpt_timer_unconfirmed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker={'code':'CHATGPT_RECURRING_TASK_CONFIRMATION_MISSING','detail':'Repo-side mailbox autoprocessor is ready and tested statically. GPT-side push/scheduler is not proven until task-card/confirmation exists.'}
if failed:
    blocker={'code':'MAILBOX_AUTONOMY_AUTOTEST_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'mailbox_autonomy_autotest.v1','bem':'BEM-707','status':status,'checks':checks,'chatgpt_timer_confirmed':chatgpt_timer_confirmed,'repo_autoprocessor_ready':not failed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem707_mailbox_autonomy_autotest.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem707_mailbox_autonomy_autotest.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-707 | Mailbox Autonomy Autotest | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Repo-side autoprocessor ready: '+str(not failed)+sep+'ChatGPT recurring timer confirmed: '+str(chatgpt_timer_confirmed)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem707_mailbox_autonomy_autotest','status':status,'repo_autoprocessor_ready':not failed,'chatgpt_timer_confirmed':chatgpt_timer_confirmed,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem707_mailbox_autonomy_autotest.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-707 '+status+' repo_autoprocessor_ready='+str(not failed)+' chatgpt_timer_confirmed='+str(chatgpt_timer_confirmed)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(fixture),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Ran mailbox autonomy autotest: validated no-operator repo-side autoprocessor paths and recorded that ChatGPT recurring timer confirmation is still missing')
"""
No issue comments.
